languages.text: "Ты только что распинался о важности дисциплины и иерархии, а сейчас смеешь противиться приказам Лорд-капитана?"
"You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"
languages.original_text: "Ты только что распинался о важности дисциплины и иерархии, а сейчас смеешь противиться приказам Лорд-капитана?"

traits.locale_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"
"You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"
"You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

languages.text: 「君、ただ規律と階級の重要性を熱く語っていただけなのに、今、艦長の命令に敢然と反旗を翻すとは？」
languages.original_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

traits.locale_text: 「君、ただ規律と階級の重要性を熱く語っていただけなのに、今、艦長の命令に敢然と反旗を翻すとは？」

languages.text: "Az önce disiplinin ve hiyerarşinin öneminden bahsediyordun, şimdi Lord Kaptan'ın emirlerine karşı gelmeye cüret mi ediyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

traits.locale_text: "Az önce disiplinin ve hiyerarşinin öneminden bahsediyordun, şimdi Lord Kaptan'ın emirlerine karşı gelmeye cüret mi ediyorsun?"

languages.text: «Acaba de hablar sobre la importancia de la disciplina y la jerarquía, ¿y ahora se atreve a oponerse a las órdenes de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán?».
languages.original_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

traits.locale_text: «Acaba de hablar sobre la importancia de la disciplina y la jerarquía, ¿y ahora se atreve a oponerse a las órdenes de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán?».

languages.text: “刚才还在那里大谈特谈纪律和等级的重要，现在就敢违抗舰长大人的命令了？”
languages.original_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

traits.locale_text: “刚才还在那里大谈特谈纪律和等级的重要，现在就敢违抗舰长大人的命令了？”

languages.text: « Vous osez vous opposer aux ordres {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} après avoir souligné l'importance de la discipline et de la hiérarchie ? »
languages.original_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous osez vous opposer aux ordres {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} après avoir souligné l'importance de la discipline et de la hiérarchie ? »

languages.text: "Gerade habt Ihr noch über die Bedeutung von Disziplin und Hierarchien gesprochen, und jetzt wagt Ihr es, die Befehle des Lord Captains zu missachten?"
languages.original_text: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"

traits.locale_text: "Gerade habt Ihr noch über die Bedeutung von Disziplin und Hierarchien gesprochen, und jetzt wagt Ihr es, die Befehle des Lord Captains zu missachten?"
